title: clastopus vestitus
intro: Clastopus vestitus, also known as the 'Fringed Clasping-leaved Tassel Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and coughs. The health benefits of Clastopus vestitus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Clastopus vestitus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
